title: eleocharis andina
intro: Eleocharis andina is a species of sedge, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Eleocharis andina has been known to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant to help relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of Eleocharis andina can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
